R1: executed_by(tree, 'scan customer against database', 'system') and exists(tree, 'scan customer against database')
R2: exists(tree, 'perform identity check') and send_exist(tree, 'identityCheckRecord')

R3: no condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'accountBalance <= 0', 'End Activity') or (condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(accountBalance <= 0) and (managerApproved == false) and (customerType != "VIP")', 'terminate'))
